title: Runtime Validation, Parsing, and Trust Boundaries · Compiler Case: Branded Refined Types
summary: Parse API, storage, URL, form, and message values into trustworthy domain records without unsafe casts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts branded refined types increment in a runtime-validated public data adapter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use brands or refined constructors only after runtime validation establishes the represented invariant.
Handle required, optional, deprecated, defaulted, and versioned fields with changed-schema fixtures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
